name_en: Nappa gabardine texture mini bag~White fabric
name_cn:
Nappa gabardine texture mini bag~White fabric
This bag features gabardine fabric and a matching color embroidered logo, giving this small bag a versatile quality. A two-tone woven strap drawstring highlights the brand's authentic style.
~Zip closure
~Hook clasp woven drawstring shoulder strap
~Lined
~Embroidered letter logo
Size: W18.5×H14×D10cm
No.: 5NE841
